so you get read + write in a single obj: ，以便在单个对象中实现读 + 写。
Connect any ioBroker state to a KNX Grou: Connect any ioBroker state to a KNX Group Address
Every value is forwarded as-is. Use for: Every value is forwarded as-is. Use for sensors, dimmers, or sliders.
For XML import: export Group Addresses i: XML 导入需先从 ETS 导出组地址（如下图所示）
Gateway detection started, this takes ab: Gateway detection started, this takes about 20 seconds...
In KNX, action and status often use sepa: 在 KNX 中，操作和状态通常使用单独的 GA。此工具自动将它们配对为
JS expression. Variable: value. Examples: JS expression. Variable: value. Examples: !!value, value*100, value>0?100:0, Math.round(value)
Keyfile content (paste .knxkeys file con: 密钥文件内容（粘贴.knxkeys文件内容）
Local IPv4 network interface: 本地 IPv4 网络接口
Minimum change required before sending t: Minimum change required before sending to KNX bus. Leave empty to send every change.
Minimum send delay between two frames [m: 两帧之间的最小发送延迟 [ms]
On each ON value the current KNX state i: On each ON value the current KNX state is read and the inverse is sent. Use for buttons that should toggle a KNX light on/off.
Only ON values are forwarded, OFF is ign: Only ON values are forwarded, OFF is ignored. Use for scene triggers or door openers where the source sends ON/OFF (press/release).
Option B: knx Adapter Migration: 选项 B：knx 适配器迁移
Please select your local network interfa: 请先选择您的本地网络接口。
Regex to identify Status GAs: 用于识别状态 GA 的正则表达式
Regex to identify Status GAs (ending wit: 用于识别状态 GA 的正则表达式（以状态、rm、rückmeldung 结尾...）。
Select a GA from the tree: Select a GA from the tree
Target namespace (e.g. knx.0 to avoid sc: 目标命名空间（例如 knx.0 以避免脚本调整）
This project is password-protected. Plea: 该项目受密码保护。请输入密码：
To merge Action and Status GA in one ioB: 要将 Action 和 Status GA 合并到一个 ioBroker 对象中，您可以让适配器生成
隧道接口 IA（可选，例如 1.1.254）
Tunnel User Password (alternative to key: 隧道用户密码（密钥文件的替代方案）
delete all existing KNX objects before i: delete all existing KNX objects before import (clean re-import)
do not overwrite existing IOB objects: 不要覆盖现有的 IOB 对象
do not warn on unknown KNX group adresse: 不对未知的 KNX 组地址发出警告
import ETS project (.knxproj or .xml): 导入 ETS 项目（.knxproj 或 .xml）
ioBroker.knx Compatibility Mode (link st: ioBroker.knx 兼容模式（内部链接状态 GA 而不是别名）
knxproj import hint: 从 ComObjects 导入标志和 DPT。使用创建别名来配对状态和操作 GA。
more than one KNX gateway found: 找到多个 KNX 网关
physical KNX address in format a/b/c not: a/b/c 格式的物理 KNX 地址无效
please provide a valid minimum send dela: 请提供 0 到 1000 [ms] 之间的有效最小发送延迟值
readout values of autoread iob objects o: 启动时自动读取 iob 对象的读数值
remove existing IOB objects that are not: 删除 ETS 导入文件中不存在的现有 IOB 对象
set acknowledgement flag when applicatio: 当应用程序写入对象时设置确认标志
use common.type boolean for 1 bit enum i: 使用 common.type boolean 作为 1 位枚举而不是数字
